name: Stytch
description: Search the users in a live Stytch Consumer project and retrieve individual user profiles.

auth.hint: Use the Stytch project_id as the Basic-auth username and the project secret as the password. Keep both credentials server-side.

tools.name: search_users
tools.description: Search or list users in the Stytch project.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Opaque next_cursor from the preceding response.

params.name: limit
params.description: Results per page; defaults to 100 and cannot exceed 1000.

params.name: query
params.description: Optional AND or OR query object containing supported user filter operands; omit it to return all users.

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Get information about one Stytch user.

params.name: user_id
params.description: Stytch user ID, or the user's external ID when configured.
